ddls:
CREATE TABLE "terms" (
  "term_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each term */,
  "term_iri" TEXT /* Internationalized Resource Identifier (IRI) of the term */,
  "term_label" TEXT /* Label or name of the term */,
  "term_alt_labels" TEXT /* Alternative labels for the term */,
  "term_definition" TEXT /* Definition of the term */,
  "source_ontology_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the source ontology */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the term was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the term was last updated */,
  "term_status" TEXT /* Status of the term (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  "term_version" TEXT /* Version of the term */,
  "last_reviewed_at" TEXT /* Date the term was last reviewed */,
  "reviewed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last reviewed the term */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("term_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_terms_source_ontology_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_ontology_id") REFERENCES ontologies ("ontology_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ontologies" (
  "ontology_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ontology */,
  "ontology_name" TEXT /* Name of the ontology */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the ontology */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the ontology */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the ontology was created */,
  "ontology_version" TEXT /* Version of the ontology */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Date the ontology was last updated */,
  "ontology_status" TEXT /* Status of the ontology (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ontology_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mappings" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping */,
  "source_term_id" INTEGER /* ID of the source term */,
  "mapped_term_id" INTEGER /* ID of the mapped term */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Confidence score of the mapping */,
  "normalized_score" REAL /* Normalized confidence score of the mapping */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the mapping */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the mapping was created */,
  "mapping_status" TEXT /* Status of the mapping (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  "last_reviewed_at" TEXT /* Date the mapping was last reviewed */,
  "reviewed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last reviewed the mapping */,
  "mapping_method" TEXT /* Method used for mapping (e.g., automatic, manual) */,
  "mapping_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the mapping */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mappings_reviewed_by FOREIGN KEY ("reviewed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mappings_mapped_term_id FOREIGN KEY ("mapped_term_id") REFERENCES terms ("term_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mappings_source_term_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_term_id") REFERENCES terms ("term_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mappings_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "term_relationships" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship */,
  "term_id" INTEGER /* ID of the term */,
  "related_term_id" INTEGER /* ID of the related term */,
  "relationship_type" TEXT /* Type of relationship (e.g., synonym, parent, child) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the relationship */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the relationship was created */,
  "relationship_status" TEXT /* Status of the relationship (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  "last_reviewed_at" TEXT /* Date the relationship was last reviewed */,
  "reviewed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last reviewed the relationship */,
  "relationship_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the relationship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_term_relationships_term_id FOREIGN KEY ("term_id") REFERENCES terms ("term_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_term_relationships_related_term_id FOREIGN KEY ("related_term_id") REFERENCES terms ("term_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_term_relationships_reviewed_by FOREIGN KEY ("reviewed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_term_relationships_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, data curator, researcher) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date the user last logged in */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object of permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., insert, update, delete) */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., insert, update, delete, review) */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table where the change occurred */,
  "row_id" INTEGER /* ID of the row that was changed */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "changed_at" TEXT /* Date and time of the change */,
  "details" TEXT /* Additional details about the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "search_history" (
  "search_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each search event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the search */,
  "search_query" TEXT /* Query used for the search */,
  "search_date" TEXT /* Date the search was performed */,
  "results_count" INTEGER /* Number of results returned */,
  "search_type" TEXT /* Type of search (e.g., term, mapping, relationship) */,
  "search_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the search */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("search_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_search_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "term_annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation */,
  "term_id" INTEGER /* ID of the term */,
  "annotation_type" TEXT /* Type of annotation (e.g., definition, synonym) */,
  "annotation_value" TEXT /* Value of the annotation */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the annotation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the annotation was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_term_annotations_term_id FOREIGN KEY ("term_id") REFERENCES terms ("term_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_term_annotations_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., term mapping, term relationships) */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "generated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the report was generated */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* JSON object containing the report data */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., generated, reviewed, published) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
